regional_cost_note: Plumbers in Dunedin typically charge $95–$120/hr for standard residential work. Emergency and after-hours callouts add $150–$250 to the bill. Dunedin’s cold winters and ageing housing stock mean burst pipes and heating system failures are common — budgeting for a regular service check is worthwhile.

businesses.name: Mains Plumbers 2004 Ltd
businesses.known_for: Multi-generational Dunedin business operating since 1947; known for reliability, transparency, and a seven-strong team of master plumbers handling residential and drainage work.

businesses.name: iPlumb Plumbing and Gas
businesses.known_for: 24/7 emergency plumbing and gas fitting based in Green Island; highly rated for fast response times and transparent pricing.

businesses.name: McNab Plumbing
businesses.known_for: Certified plumbers and gasfitters praised for exceptional communication, tidy workmanship, and reliable scheduling across residential and commercial jobs.

businesses.name: Gas & Water Ltd
businesses.known_for: Master Plumbers member established in 2003; gas fitting and CCTV drain inspection specialists with a 12-month workmanship guarantee and 77+ Google reviews.

businesses.name: Foleys Dunedin
businesses.known_for: Dunedin’s oldest plumbing company (est. 1934) and one of NZ’s largest; handles everything from leaking taps to full commercial fit-outs with 13 branches nationwide.

businesses.name: McIvor Plumbers
businesses.known_for: Family-owned business with over 60 years in Dunedin; MD Dave McIvor is a licensed Certifying Plumber, Gasfitter, and Drainlayer.

businesses.name: Laser Plumbing Dunedin Central
businesses.known_for: National Laser franchise with local expertise; praised for water filtration installations and reliable commercial plumbing across central Dunedin.
